name: @aevonix/colonyai
description: Colony intelligence sidecar - graph memory, autonomy loop, context assembly, safety pipeline

sidecarUrl.description: URL for the Colony sidecar API (default: http://localhost:7777)

apiKey.description: API key for Colony sidecar authentication (Authorization: Bearer). Optional for local dev.

ownReasoningLoop.description: Register Colony as the active agent harness (default: false)

ownMemoryCapability.description: Register Colony as the active memory capability (default: false)

ownContextEngine.description: Register Colony as the active context engine (default: false)

hostId.description: Identity reported back to Colony for audit/scoping (default: openclaw)

hostLLM.description: Host LLM configuration forwarded to the sidecar at startup

llmConfig.description: LLM provider config to send to sidecar (auto-detected from OpenClaw config if omitted)

provider.description: LLM provider: anthropic, openai, zai, or local

apiKey.description: API key for the LLM provider

baseUrl.description: Custom base URL for OpenAI-compatible providers

models.description: Model IDs per tier: { small, medium, large }
